# attempt-status

Single source of truth for `Attempt` status display metadata. All plugins that
render an attempt's status as a colored badge import `AttemptStatusBadge` from
here instead of defining their own color/label maps. Mirrors the `task-status`
plugin for the attempt enum. Labels are the sentence-case of the status key,
derived via `formatStatusLabel`, so they never drift from the house casing rule.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Single source of truth for Attempt status display metadata — badge color and sentence-case label.
- Web:
  - Uses: `primitives/css/badge.Badge`, `primitives/css/badge.formatStatusLabel`
  - Exports: Values: `ATTEMPT_STATUS_META`, `AttemptStatusBadge`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `active-data/task`, `tasks/task-events`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
